NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENTH AND MARKET, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AN, PEIPEI JIANG, JIANYI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 8 10TH STREET #3307, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENTH AND MARKET, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AN, PEIPEI JIANG, JIANYI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE $17,085.00 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $494.00 COSTS, $6,927.51 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, $20.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,886.51, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENTH AND MARKET, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT AN, PEIPEI JIANG, JIANYI
